allow: Bash(mvn compile *)
Bash(npx vite *)
Bash(mvn -version)
Bash(JAVA_HOME=/d/Java/jdk-21 mvn compile -q)
Bash(JAVA_HOME=/d/Java/jdk-21 mvn -f d:/IdeaCode/lifelong-credit-bank/pom.xml compile -q)

Bash(echo "import java.security.MessageDigest; import java.security.SecureRandom; import java.util.HexFormat; public class GenHash { public static void main\(String[] args\) throws Exception { SecureRandom sr = new SecureRandom\(\); byte[] salt = new byte[16]; sr.nextBytes\(salt\); String saltHex = HexFormat.of\(\).formatHex\(salt\); MessageDigest md = MessageDigest.getInstance\(\\"SHA-256\\"\); md.update\(saltHex.getBytes\(\)\); byte[] hash = md.digest\(\\"123456\\".getBytes\(\)\); String hashHex = HexFormat.of\(\).formatHex\(hash\); System.out.println\(saltHex + \\":\\" + hashHex\); } }")
Bash(JAVA_HOME=/d/Java/jdk-21 /d/Java/jdk-21/bin/javac /tmp/GenHash.java -d /tmp)
Bash(JAVA_HOME=/d/Java/jdk-21 /d/Java/jdk-21/bin/java -cp /tmp GenHash)
Bash(/d/Java/jdk-21/bin/java -version)

Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 -e "USE credit_bank; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS learner_count FROM learner; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS product_count FROM credit_product; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS account_count FROM credit_account;")
Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 credit_bank)
Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 credit_bank -e "DESC learner;")
Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 credit_bank -e "SELECT id, username, real_name, role FROM learner;")
Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 credit_bank -e "SELECT version, description, success FROM flyway_schema_history ORDER BY version;")

Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 credit_bank -e "INSERT INTO flyway_schema_history \(installed_rank, version, description, type, script, checksum, installed_by, installed_on, execution_time, success\) VALUES \(4, '4', 'seed users', 'SQL', 'V4__seed_users.sql', 0, 'root', NOW\(\), 100, 1\);")
Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 credit_bank -t -e "SELECT id, username, real_name, role, status FROM learner;")
Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 credit_bank -t -e "SELECT id, learner_id, total_credits, available_credits, frozen_credits FROM credit_account;")
Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 credit_bank -t -e "SELECT id, learner_id, transaction_type, amount, balance_before, balance_after, remark FROM credit_transaction ORDER BY id;")
Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 credit_bank -t -e "SELECT id, order_no, learner_id, product_name, credit_amount, order_status FROM credit_order;")
Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 credit_bank -e "UPDATE flyway_schema_history SET checksum = 1010446563 WHERE version = '4';")
Bash(JAVA_HOME=/d/Java/jdk-21 mvn -f d:/IdeaCode/lifelong-credit-bank/pom.xml compile)

Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 credit_bank -e "INSERT INTO flyway_schema_history \(installed_rank, version, description, type, script, checksum, installed_by, installed_on, execution_time, success\) VALUES \(5, '5', 'cart', 'SQL', 'V5__cart.sql', 0, 'root', NOW\(\), 50, 1\);")
Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 credit_bank -t -e "SHOW CREATE TABLE cart\\G")
Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 credit_bank -e "UPDATE flyway_schema_history SET checksum = -1761116533 WHERE version = '5';")
Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 credit_bank -e "SELECT version, checksum, description FROM flyway_schema_history ORDER BY version;")
